lastReleaseMessage: Docs drift-fix: DESIGN.md caught up with reality. No code...

items: Real-use testing and iterate cycles still pending (demo-seed harness now exists to unblock it: scripts/seed-demo.ps1)
Live payment integration on top of the v0.6.0 per-seat entitlement plumbing (Stripe checkout + webhooks; entitlement is computed but nothing is gated yet)

barRaise.topFinding: The v0.7.x quality pass is now five days stranded in the working tree and has crossed from hygiene nit into real drift at HEAD. The pass is good: schedule.ts replaces the per-assignment insert loop with a single db.batch() (kills the O(N-squared) existing.some() scan and the partial-write window), usersWithMembershipsBulk collapses the 1+2N user-list query into two chunked IN-queries and is wired at both callers, open-shifts.ts folds a double correlated subquery into one grouped LEFT JOIN, and migration 0011 creates the audit_log(organization_id, created_at) composite DESIGN section 15 described for weeks. None of it exists at HEAD. Migration 0011 and scripts/sync-audit-dashboard.ps1 are still untracked on the FUSE mount this project CLAUDE.md documents as prone to losing files, so committed schema stops at 0010. The new part: HEAD DESIGN section 15 still says the composite does not exist while disk says it does, so a reader at HEAD gets the pre-fix answer. Health slips to 88 (was 89) because five correct-but-unshipped fixes buy nothing in prod; all five hard rules pass so there is no BLOCK and the verdict holds at in-progress. release-sync-01 escalates MED to HIGH. audit-loop-integrity-01 is now chronic at five runs (the dashboard audit pointer reads 2026-07-05 while the 07-16 report sits on disk) and is blocked behind the same release, since its fix is one of the untracked files.

actions.title: Commit and release the in-flight v0.7.x quality pass so untracked migration 0011, the schedule-generate batch rewrite, the usersWithMembershipsBulk N+1 fix, the open-shifts grouped-join fix, scripts/sync-audit-dashboard.ps1, and the DESIGN section 15/17/20 updates land at HEAD and deploy (schema advances to 0011). Escalated from MED: HEAD DESIGN section 15 now contradicts the disk, and two untracked files have sat 5 days on a loss-prone mount.

After committing scripts/sync-audit-dashboard.ps1, wire a call to it into the nightly audit routine so the dashboard audit pointer self-syncs between releases; it currently reads 2026-07-05 while docs/CANONICAL_AUDIT-2026-07-16.md exists on disk (11 days stale). Chronic at 5 runs; escalate at the next constellation.

Refresh X:\YesAndEverything\projects\scheduler\{index,design}.html from v0.4.1 to the current v0.7.x surface (M7.1 org-switcher, v0.6.0 billing entitlement, migrations 0009/0010/0011). The live:version marker stamps correctly; only the hand-written prose is stale (meta description line 7, what-s-new line 225).

deferred.title: Surface the drive-to-first-user-via-seed-demo vs re-park posture decision to Nick; both completion gates dead-end on it.
deferred.reason: blocked on Nick decision: posture (drive vs park)

deferred.title: Keep the live-payment build gated behind an explicit Stripe milestone commitment so entitlement work stops accreting ahead of revenue.
deferred.reason: blocked on Nick decision: commit to Stripe milestone

deferred.title: Record an explicit DESIGN section 23 decision on whether YaS is driven to first real user or re-parked.
deferred.reason: blocked on Nick decision: posture call
